segments.text: Here is the opening move. Let's start by opening the Mondula multi-step form demo page. This gives the whole demo a place to stand.
segments.fallback_text: We start by opening the Mondula multi-step form demo page. That gives the workflow a stage.
segments.subtitle: Step 1: Open the Mondula multi-step form demo page

segments.text: We will hold for a beat here and let the screen settle before we move on.
segments.fallback_text: We will let the page catch up.
segments.subtitle: We will hold for a beat here and let the screen settle before we move on.

segments.text: With the setup in place, we can chase the signal. We move from the intro page to the first form step.

segments.text: Now the target comes into focus. We fill first page text and textarea fields. This is exactly the repetitive work a person should only explain once.
segments.fallback_text: Next, we fill first page text and textarea fields. This is where automation saves patience.

segments.text: This is where the useful part starts. We go to the next page with additional input fields.

segments.text: Here the workflow stops posing and starts proving. We fill text, custom textarea, and date fields on page two. Automation earns trust fastest in moments like this.

segments.text: Still thinking. No rush, we will wait for the page to finish the move.

segments.subtitle: Still thinking. No rush, we will wait for the page to finish the move.

segments.text: Now the page has something to say. We proceed to radio, checkbox, and dropdown inputs. It keeps the flow easy to follow without sounding like a checklist.

segments.text: This is where the pattern starts to show. We select a radio option, multiple checkboxes, and a dropdown value.

segments.text: Here the workflow stops posing and starts proving. We open the conditional input section. From here, every click has context.

segments.text: Now the payoff is close enough to see. We fill conditional fields based on the selected dish.

segments.text: This is where the result starts to feel earned. We move to the final contact-details page.
